metadata.verification_mode: direct_in_WSL_openEuler (container isolation NOT used - see problems_encountered)

host_machine.docker_version: Docker version 18.09.0 (installed but NON-FUNCTIONAL on WSL1)

container.note: Verification ran directly in WSL openEuler 24.03 (LTS-SP3), which is itself one of the two recommended target images.

image_source.selection_reason: Docker cannot run on this host (WSL1, no real kernel). The WSL distro is already openEuler 24.03 LTS - the exact OS the skill would have containerized - so verification was performed directly in it as the only viable path.

architecture.value: aarch64 (target per RPM naming ham-libs-0.0.1.aarch64.rpm); verified on x86_64

recommended_image.value: openEuler (project is openEuler/ham, build flags are Linux/GCC specific) -> openEuler 24.03 LTS

value: libboundscheck (3rdparty submodule, gitee openEuler/libboundscheck v1.1.16) - must build + install libboundscheck.so to /usr/lib64
mockcpp v2.7 (test submodule, gitee) - UT only
lcov/genhtml - coverage report only (NOT in openEuler repo)
dos2unix - referenced by test/run_dt.sh (NOT in openEuler repo)

build_commands.source: build.sh + README is silent on build commands

ut_commands.value: cd test && bash run_dt.sh   (builds ham_dt via gtest+mockcpp, runs ./ham_dt, then lcov/genhtml coverage)

sample_commands.value: N/A - HAM ships a shared library (libham.so) plugin; no standalone sample/example executable in repo

execution_log.error: panic: invalid page type: 0: 4 (boltdb mmap assertion) - WSL1 cannot run Docker Engine

execution_log.output: libboundscheck v1.1.16, googletest, mockcpp v2.7 cloned from gitee

execution_log.command: dnf install -y cmake gcc gcc-c++ make git patch

FAILED - WSL1 boltdb panic, Docker unusable

ut.note: All tests passed. Coverage HTML (lcov/genhtml) skipped - lcov not available in openEuler repo. gtest XML produced at test/build/gcovr_report/test_detail.xml.

sample.note: HAM is a shared-library plugin (libham.so), no standalone runnable sample/example in repo.

documentation_gaps: README.md 未提供任何构建命令/编译步骤 - 构建方式只能从 build.sh 反推
README.md 未列出构建依赖 (cmake>=3.16, gcc>=7.3, libboundscheck 等) - 仅能从 CMakeLists.txt/building.cmake 推断
src/CMakeLists.txt 硬编码链接 /usr/lib64/libboundscheck.so, 但文档未说明需先手动构建并安装 libboundscheck
test/run_dt.sh 依赖 dos2unix 和 lcov/genhtml, 但文档未声明, 且二者在 openEuler 24.03 默认源中不可得
shell 脚本 (build.sh, run_dt.sh) 在 Windows 检出后为 CRLF 行结尾, 在 Linux 上直接运行会报 $'\r' 语法错误 - 仓库缺少 .gitattributes 强制 LF
文档声称交付为 aarch64 RPM, 但未提供 RPM 构建/打包的明确指令 (ham.spec 存在但 README 未引用)

problems_encountered.问题: Docker 无法在本机运行: 本机为 WSL1 (内核 4.4.0-17763-Microsoft, Windows build 17763), 无真实 Linux 内核, dockerd 启动即 boltdb mmap panic (invalid page type: 0: 4); 且该 Windows 版本过旧 (需 18362+) 无法升级到 WSL2。
problems_encountered.解决方案: 改为直接在 WSL 的 openEuler 24.03 (LTS-SP3) 发行版中验证。该发行版本身即为 skill 推荐的两个目标镜像之一, 与容器内环境同 OS/版本, 验证保真度高, 仅缺少容器隔离。
problems_encountered.来源: skill 决策树步骤4 (Docker 不可用时通知用户); 用户确认按 skill 路径推进

problems_encountered.问题: src/CMakeLists.txt 链接 /usr/lib64/libboundscheck.so, 但该库默认不存在。
problems_encountered.解决方案: 构建前先在 3rdparty/libboundscheck 执行 make 生成 libboundscheck.so, 复制到 /usr/lib64 并 ldconfig。

problems_encountered.问题: build.sh / run_dt.sh 为 CRLF 行结尾, 在 Linux bash 报 $'\r' 语法错误。
problems_encountered.解决方案: 对暂存副本执行 sed -i 's/\r$//' 规范化为 LF (未修改原始源码)。
problems_encountered.来源: 源码在 Windows 端检出导致; 验证副本侧规范化

problems_encountered.问题: test/run_dt.sh 中 patch_mockcpp 调用 dos2unix (不可用) 并应用 arm64 专用补丁。
problems_encountered.解决方案: 本机为 x86_64, 无需 arm64 补丁; 预先将 mockcpp_support_arm64.patch 放入 mockcpp 目录使 patch_mockcpp 提前 return 0, 跳过补丁与 dos2unix。

problems_encountered.问题: run_dt.sh 末尾的 lcov/genhtml 覆盖率步骤失败 (lcov 在 openEuler 24.03 默认源不可得)。
problems_encountered.解决方案: 该步骤在全部测试通过且生成 gtest XML 之后执行, 不影响测试结论; 记录为覆盖率报告缺失。
problems_encountered.来源: run_dt.sh 第44行 lcov: command not found
